title: Counting the number of times a given number appears on a column
excerpt:
Hi there. 
I’ve assigned values to my statuses and now I have a column full of different numbers. I need to calculate how many times each number appears in that column to be able to graph it. Any ideas on how to do it wi…

posts.author: randmer (caroline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.

I’ve assigned values to my statuses and now I have a column full of different numbers. I need to calculate how many times each number appears in that column to be able to graph it. Any ideas on how to do it without having to do it manually?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@randmer have you tried a bar chart with the numbers column as the X Axis?
